title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 02 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 02 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 02 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends，an decrease of 3.10% throughout the day; the main contract closed 609；some traders quotationis still stronger;steel mills purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general. PBF at Shandong port dealt 670-680 yuan/ mt,decreased 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday; IOCJ at Shandong port dealt 790 yuan/mt;PBF at Tangshan port dealt 675-680 yuan/mt, decreased 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday; According to SMM research, this week SMM's blast furnace operating rate was 79.05% on down 0.15% month-on-week.
